programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Photographer Jamie Baker hosts the fourth party in London, and his ambitious menu of langoustine and crab ravioli, herb crusted rack of lamb, and milloux of chocolate - combined with his choice of evening entertainment - go down well, until an unexpected turn of events scuppers his plans(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.desc: Choir director Joseph Benneh hosts the fourth dinner party in Milton Keynes, hoping the flavours from his homeland Ghana and a vocal masterclass will prove a winning combination. programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: David Attenborough highlights the curiosities that have led to accusations of forgery, but have ultimately helped assist the rethinking of evolution. Similarly, the midwife toad became the centre of a scientific storm in the 1920s that led to accusations of fakery(n)

programme.desc: Four talented makers race against the clock to create a seasonal stocking. Plus, a series of tips on ways to improve festive stitching(n)

programme.title: Flirty Dancing
programme.desc: Ashley Banjo creates a sensual, tender and intimate dance in a picturesque moonlit park overlooking the bright lights of London for dance-fit teacher 23-year-old Lily, from the Isle of Wight, and 22-year-old Jake, a dance teacher from Manchester. He also works with fortysomething music lovers Briony and Baz, choreographing a dance against the backdrop of the colourful coastal town of Portmeirion in north Wales, complete with a challenging lift that requires Baz to take the lead. Can both couples throw caution to the wind and embrace the experience?(n)

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: A 19-year-old computer enthusiast goes on the first date of his life, while a music producer and a singer who both enjoyed pop success in the 1970s meet at Fred's restaurant. programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: A model with dreams of becoming a singer seeks a man who can help her feel more confident in herself, and may find what she is looking for in an aspiring fashion designer. programme.title: Gogglebox

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: As the festive season approaches at Chester Zoo, Bactrian camels Becky and Mei-Li are about to be given a seasonal surprise in the shape of Sparky, a young addition to the herd. In the zoo's aquarium, Clerk and Doris, long-term mascara barb fish partners, welcome three new females in their tank. Meanwhile, red pandas Nima and Koda are going through a difficult time in their relationship(n)

programme.title: My Grandparents' War
programme.desc: The actress discovers what happened to her grandfather, William, who served as a commanding officer in the Royal Navy during the Second World War. Kristin uncovers how he saved thousands of fellow soldiers at Dunkirk, and endured the horrors of the Russian Arctic convoys. Throughout the programme, Kristin meets the families of people her grandfather saved during the war, as well as veterans who served alongside him(n)

programme.desc: Four amateur cooks in Birmingham compete for the £1,000 prize. programme.title: The Snowman

In east London, an Indian restaurant owner begins to take his financial responsibilities seriously when Del and Dael start removing cookers and freezers from his premises, and a pair of pensioners in Oxfordshire hope the High Court will provide them a lifeline as they try to pay off a £4,000 bill to a solicitors' firm after a failed compensation claim(n)

Crime drama, starring Hill Harper(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green have difficulty pinning the death of a strangled woman on their prime suspect, drug dealer Francis 'Taz' Partell. However, while questioning one of his former associates, they discover new evidence indicating he was responsible for another murder in the Bronx(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: An Iraqi immigrant kills a female veteran of the second Gulf War for torturing her brother at Abu Ghraib prison. However, the detectives learn the accused's lawyer plans to defend his client as an enemy combatant, immune from prosecution under the terms of the Geneva Convention, and that they may have no jurisdiction over the case. Starring Jesse L Martin and Dennis Farina(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A woman is accused of murdering her husband's mistress. Although the crime is found to be premeditated, the defendant's lawyer claims his client's actions were prompted by post-traumatic stress syndrome arising from the September 11 terrorist attack. Starring Dennis Farina(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica pulls out all the stops to help private eye Harry McGraw find his partner's murderer. Angela Lansbury and Jerry Orbach star(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica inherits shares in an American football team. When the owner of the squad is found dead she investigates a possible connection to a series of offers she has received to buy her out. Angela Lansbury stars(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A convicted child murderer is struck and left for dead by a motorist just weeks after his prison release, but Fontana and Green are initially unenthusiastic about finding out who ran him over. It is not until the killer dies from his injuries that they investigate inside the prison where he served his sentence - and uncover evidence that leads McCoy to make a startling discovery. Starring Dennis Farina(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A wealthy man is found beaten to death in his home, prompting detectives Fontana and Green to suspect the victim's wife and the contractor who installed the security system. McCoy and Southerlyn investigate an affair between the two, and seek to turn them against each other, but a second unexpected crime slows down their case(n)

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: Part one of two. Hanna receives a call for help from a former CIA colleague, only to find the man dead in an apparent suicide. Further investigations reveal his phone call was pre-recorded, putting the team onto the trail of a conspiracy that sees Deeks and Kensi go undercover at a dog show - complete with prize poodle - to look into a breeder the victim was investigating before he died. programme.title: Ransom

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.desc: A talented chef narrowly avoids dying of stab wounds during an attack in her home, and the team is called in to investigate the circumstances surrounding the incident. programme.title: CSI: Miami

programme.title: CSI: Miami

programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the death of Karen Hall, a staff member in the State Attorney General's Office, whose body has been found in the Hudson River - and her boss Frank Conroy quickly becomes a suspect. Crime drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin(n)

McCoy then learns the defence attorney will claim his client took action to ward off a threat by the con and his 'brotherhood'. Guest starring Candice Bergen(n)

programme.desc: McCoy discovers two suicide victims were participating in clinical trials of an experimental antidepressant, prompting him to charge the drug company's CEO with second-degree murder. programme.desc: A rap producer is found shot dead in his studio and suspicion falls on one of his proteges, a hip-hop artist whose lyrics describe a similar killing. programme.desc: Fontana and Green are baffled by a series of flu-related deaths until they discover the victims were given bogus vaccines. programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.desc: A famous novelist dies after undergoing plastic surgery, leading to the discovery that her surgeon made a crucial mistake by prescribing a drug that should not have been mixed with the antidepressants she was already taking. programme.title: Worlds Apart with Oksana Boyko
programme.desc: Worlds Apart is a fast-paced, in-depth discussion on the pressing issues of the day. The host Oksana Boyko strives to depart from the traditional Q-and-A form of interview in favor of an emotive and engaging conversation. While the title and format of the program presuppose differences of opinion, WA's main goal is to facilitate public debate in an intelligent and respectful manner(n)

They work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught(n)

programme.desc: Anne Robinson hosts the quick-fire general knowledge quiz where players answer questions to add to a prize pot, voting off who they think is the weakest link after each round.(n)
